hdf5.description: Enable HDF5 snapshot, halo, clump, and extract IO.

lua.description: Enable Lua expressions for projection map customization.

python-bridge.description: Enable Python/ZeroMQ bridge and remote frame/input tools.

geometry.description: Enable Eigen-backed geometrical analysis and streamline tools.

power-spectrum.description: Enable FFTW-backed Fourier power spectrum analysis.
